form.formComment: Useful gelding. Last run won by 1.0 len Wetherby on March 17 over 4800m defeating Eaton Anne carrying 71kg at $4.50 in a steeplechase. Run to post a big 24 len win. Ffos Las on March 1 over 4800m on heavy going defeating The Moonlight Man carrying 76kg at $2.60 in a steeplechase. In top form and can make it a winning hat-trick.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Had made a mistake at the fourth last fence.

form.formComment: Useful type. Last outing finished second in a small field at Doncaster on March 13 over 5200m, a head behind Jamesieconn carrying 76kg at $3.80. Race before pulled up at Taunton on February 26 over 4300m. Will be thereabouts once more.

form.formComment: Useful type. Last start finished seventh of 10 starters at Kelso on March 21 over 4300m, 16 len behind Diamond Dealer carrying 64.5kg at $12. Before that made some head-way from midfield; finished second in a small field at this track on February 19 over 5300m, slow track; 3.5 len behind Goodoldbill carrying 76kg at $2. Must be a chance.

form.formComment: Second-up today. First-up after a year finished fifth of 10 runners at Newcastle on March 14 over 4700m, 22 len behind Goodoldbill carrying 73.5kg at $8.50. Previously second-up finished fifth of 11 starters at Uttoxeter on December 20 2024 over 4400m, slow track; 15 len behind Subtle Fortune carrying 70kg at $26. Doubt she will play a major role today.

form.formComment: Chasing a hat-trick. Last start won by 0.8 len Newcastle on March 14 over 4700m defeating Swallows Song carrying 64.5kg at $9.50 in a steeplechase. Race before won by 3.5 len this track on February 19 over 5300m on rain affected going defeating Defence Witness carrying 62kg at $15 in a steeplechase. No reason to get off him at this stage.
